subtitle.en: Practical guides for OEM / ODM buyers planning plastic injection molding, material selection and mold development projects.
subtitle.zh: 面向 OEM / ODM 买家的实用指南，帮助规划塑胶注塑、选材与模具开发项目。

title.en: How to Choose the Right Material for Plastic Enclosures
title.zh: 如何为塑胶外壳选择合适材料

summary.en: A buyer-focused guide to matching enclosure requirements with resin performance, finishing needs and production cost.
summary.zh: 从外壳性能、表面处理和生产成本出发，帮助买家选择合适塑胶材料。

body.en: An enclosure used indoors, outdoors, near heat or around chemicals will need different resin properties. Share the target environment early so the material choice is based on real working conditions.
body.zh: 室内、户外、高温或接触化学品的外壳，对材料性能要求不同。尽早说明使用环境，才能让选材基于真实工况。

body.en: Gloss, transparency, color stability and surface texture can affect the material route. Some projects require a resin that is easier to spray, print or laser mark after molding.
body.zh: 光泽、透明度、颜色稳定性和表面纹理都会影响材料路线。有些项目还需要材料便于喷涂、印刷或激光标记。

body.en: Part size, wall thickness, tolerance and estimated quantity influence both mold design and molding cost. Drawings or 3D files make material recommendations much more accurate.
body.zh: 产品尺寸、壁厚、公差和预计数量会影响模具设计与成型成本。提供图纸或 3D 文件能让选材建议更准确。

title.en: ABS vs PC Plastic: Which Is Better for Electronic Housings?
title.zh: ABS 和 PC 哪种更适合电子产品外壳？

summary.en: Compare two common enclosure materials across strength, heat resistance, transparency, finishing and budget.
summary.zh: 从强度、耐热、透明、后处理和预算等方面比较两种常见外壳材料。

heading.en: ABS is practical for many housings
heading.zh: ABS 适合多数常规外壳

body.en: ABS is often selected for electronic housings because it is easy to mold, has good impact resistance and accepts common finishing processes such as painting and printing.
body.zh: ABS 常用于电子外壳，因为它易成型、抗冲击性较好，也适合喷涂、丝印等常见后处理。

heading.en: PC is stronger in demanding uses
heading.zh: PC 更适合高要求场景

body.en: PC offers higher heat resistance and optical clarity. It can be a better choice when the product needs transparency, stronger mechanical performance or more demanding service conditions.
body.zh: PC 具备更好的耐热性和透明性。当产品需要透明、较高机械性能或更严苛使用条件时，PC 更有优势。

heading.en: PC+ABS can be a balanced option

body.en: For projects needing better toughness than ABS while keeping good moldability, PC+ABS can provide a balanced route for many electronics and industrial components.
body.zh: 如果项目需要比 ABS 更好的韧性，同时又希望保持较好的成型性，PC+ABS 常是电子和工业部件的折中选择。

summary.en: A simple explanation of the injection molding process from resin and mold to sampling, production and inspection.
summary.zh: 用简单方式说明塑胶注塑从材料、模具到打样、量产和检验的基本流程。

body.en: Injection molding uses a custom mold cavity to shape molten plastic into repeatable parts. Mold design directly affects appearance, tolerance and production stability.
body.zh: 注塑成型通过定制模腔让熔融塑料形成可重复生产的零件。模具设计会直接影响外观、公差和量产稳定性。

body.en: Before mass production, trial molding checks part size, appearance, assembly fit and process window. This step helps correct issues before larger production runs.
body.zh: 量产前会通过试模检查尺寸、外观、装配配合和工艺窗口，帮助在大批量生产前修正问题。

body.en: Stable production depends on material control, machine settings, in-process inspection and final checks before delivery.
body.zh: 稳定量产依赖材料管控、设备参数、过程检验以及出货前检查。

title.en: How to Start a Custom Plastic Product Project
title.zh: 如何启动一个定制塑胶产品项目

summary.en: What buyers should prepare before asking for a quote: drawings, material needs, quantities, samples and assembly expectations.
summary.zh: 询价前应准备哪些信息：图纸、材料需求、数量、样品和组装要求。

body.en: 2D drawings, 3D files or physical samples help the engineering team understand geometry, tolerances and critical surfaces.
body.zh: 2D 图纸、3D 文件或实物样品能帮助工程团队理解结构、公差和关键外观面。

body.en: Estimated order quantity, application environment and assembly requirements influence tooling, material choice and production planning.
body.zh: 预计数量、应用环境和装配要求会影响模具方案、材料选择和生产计划。

body.en: Color, printing, laser marking, assembly and packaging should be discussed early because they affect both cost and delivery schedule.
body.zh: 颜色、印刷、激光标记、组装和包装应尽早沟通，因为这些会影响成本和交期。

summary.en: Understand how a custom plastic mold moves from product review and DFM to tooling, trial molding and production maintenance.
summary.zh: 了解定制塑胶模具如何从产品评审、DFM 到开模、试模和量产维护。

body.en: Design-for-manufacturing review checks wall thickness, draft angle, gate location and assembly risks before cutting steel.
body.zh: 可制造性分析会在加工模具前检查壁厚、脱模斜度、进胶位置和装配风险。

body.en: After mold fabrication, trial molding produces initial samples for dimension review, appearance inspection and functional validation.
body.zh: 模具加工完成后，通过试模生产初样，用于尺寸评审、外观检查和功能验证。

heading.zh: 模具维护保障稳定量产

body.en: A production mold needs regular maintenance, parameter control and quality feedback to keep parts consistent over repeated orders.
body.zh: 量产模具需要定期维护、参数管控和品质反馈，才能在多批次订单中保持产品一致性。
